<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/checks/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

## Rule ID

`kind: filesystem_filename_kebab_case`

## Purpose

Require lowercase kebab-case filenames (without extension).

## Example

```yaml
collections:
  notes:
    path: notes
    checks:
      - kind: filesystem_filename_kebab_case
```
